summary: Applied the released mainline Gitea automation, verified the private Gitea service and Keycloak OIDC bootstrap on docker-runtime-lv3, confirmed the docker-build-lv3 Actions runner stayed online, and proved both workflow execution and webhook delivery from a smoke repository push.

verification.observed: From released main commit 61837be, `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/gitea.yml --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` completed successfully across proxmox_florin, postgres-lv3, docker-runtime-lv3, and docker-build-lv3.
`curl -sf http://100.118.189.95:3009/api/v1/version` returned Gitea `1.25.5`, and the repo-managed swagger endpoint remained reachable at `http://100.118.189.95:3009/api/swagger`.
`GET /api/v1/admin/actions/runners` with the mirrored admin token returned runner `docker-build-lv3` with `status: online`.
Smoke repository `ops/adr-0143-final-smoke-20260325111646` created through the live Gitea API produced workflow run `2` with `status: completed` and `conclusion: success` after a push to `main`.
PTSV3 bin `http://ptsv3.com/adr014320260325111646` recorded a `POST` from Gitea with header `X-Gitea-Event: push` and a payload body containing `refs/heads/main`.

notes: The live rollout exposed and fixed two Docker baseline issues before the final green mainline apply: nftables reloads were wiping Docker-managed iptables chains on both docker-runtime-lv3 and docker-build-lv3, and the build VM needed to use the Docker Compose plugin path supplied by the shared Docker runtime rather than Debian's conflicting docker-compose package.

The Gitea bootstrap path also required two runtime fixes before the first successful converge: Keycloak OIDC bootstrap must use an internally reachable discovery URL while preserving the public issuer metadata, and auth-source lookup had to use `gitea admin auth list` instead of direct SQL against `login_source`.
Smoke-test repositories used for repository creation, workflow, and webhook verification were created and removed during validation; the canonical bootstrap path remains `ops/proxmox_florin_server`.
